# User Profile

**Role:** Solo software engineer
**Company:** Independent (consulting + indie projects)
**Industry:** Developer tooling
**Team Size:** Solo
**Stage:** Side projects + occasional client work

## What I Do
- Building a Rust CLI tool (most of my time, ~60%)
- Writing technical blog posts and weekly dev notes
- Reviewing PRs from open-source contributors
- Triaging GitHub issues across 4 repos I maintain
- Occasional client implementation work

## What I'm Trying to Grow or Achieve
- Ship v1 of my CLI tool by end of quarter
- Reduce time spent on PR review without sacrificing quality
- Build a content engine that turns observed engineering problems into blog posts
- Eventually productize the CLI into a SaaS

## Constraints
- No client code or NDA-protected content should be captured
- Banking and password-manager windows are blocklisted
- Working alone — no team to share burden, so leverage matters

## Tech Stack
- VS Code, terminal (wezterm), GitHub web UI, Linear
- Rust + tokio for the CLI
- Markdown blog (Astro), GitHub Actions
